sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14478" key="a)prosqete/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπροσ-θετέω</orth>, <sense id="n14478.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suspend judgement,</tr_> Timo<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0033.tlg002.perseus-grc1:80" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">80</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
